task_completion.visual_evidence: A central node or shape in the EdrawMax canvas containing the exact text 'Ransomware Infection'.
Nodes on the left side of the central event (representing threats) containing the text 'Phishing Email' and 'Unpatched Server'.
Nodes on the right side of the central event (representing consequences) containing the text 'Data Encryption' and 'Reputation Damage'.

task_completion.description: Add preventive barriers 'Email Filter' and 'Vulnerability Scan'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Nodes or text placed on the lines/pathways between the threats and the central event containing 'Email Filter' and 'Vulnerability Scan'.

task_completion.description: Add recovery barriers 'Offline Backups' and 'PR Crisis Plan'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Nodes or text placed on the lines/pathways between the central event and the consequences containing 'Offline Backups' and 'PR Crisis Plan'.

task_completion.description: Save the native EdrawMax file as ransomware_bowtie.eddx
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file explorer, or the EdrawMax window title bar showing the file saved as 'ransomware_bowtie.eddx' in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as a PDF file named ransomware_bowtie.pdf
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, PDF viewer, or file explorer showing 'ransomware_bowtie.pdf' created in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the EdrawMax graphical user interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax application open with shapes being dragged, dropped, and edited, rather than terminal commands writing XML/EDDX files directly.

integrity.description: The agent actually created a diagram with connected shapes and lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The canvas should show distinct shapes connected by lines (a BowTie structure), not just plain text typed into a single text box or a word processor.

integrity.description: The PDF was exported using EdrawMax's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the EdrawMax 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog for PDF, rather than terminal commands like ImageMagick or pandoc converting a text file to PDF.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must contain exactly these text nodes: 'Ransomware Infection', 'Phishing Email', 'Unpatched Server', 'Data Encryption', 'Reputation Damage', 'Email Filter', 'Vulnerability Scan', 'Offline Backups', and 'PR Crisis Plan'. The native file must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/ransomware_bowtie.eddx' and the PDF exported to '/home/ga/Documents/ransomware_bowtie.pdf'.
